description: Style NoteUnderstated colour block peep-toe wedges from cobblerz - the reason why a woman can't have enough shoes! The soft leatherette and the braid styling on the wedge heel make this lust-worthy pair top our wishlist this season. The perfect accessory to colout block your ensemble, make sure this pair goes with at least one colour in your outfit.Heel: 3"Product DetailsBlack wedge peep-toes with beige and off-white colour pop on the toeSoft footbed with the brand patch at the heelWedge style heel with braided fabric on the sidesTPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves on the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
